name: Churu Cat Treats Chicken With Shrimp Flavor Recipe 4 Tubes
shortDescription: Churu Cat Lickable Treats Chicken with Shrimp 4 tubes of creamy, grain-free puree made with real chicken and natural shrimp flavor. Low-calorie, hydrating, with taurine and vitamin E for healthy cats.
description: Give your cat a taste they’ll slurp up with Churu Chicken with Shrimp ! These creamy, lickable purée tubes are made with real chicken and natural shrimp flavor , delivering irresistible taste in every squeeze. With 91% moisture and only 6 calories per tube , this grain-free treat helps support hydration while staying light and healthy. Perfect for hand-feeding, serving from a bowl, mixing into meals, or hiding medication—Churu makes treat time fun and interactive. Key Benefits: Grain-Free & Delicious: Made with real chicken and natural shrimp flavor—no grains, artificial colors, or preservatives Interactive Feeding: Lick from the tube, lap from a bowl, or mix with kibble or wet food Supports Hydration: 91% moisture helps keep cats hydrated and supports urinary health Nutritious Boost: Added vitamin E and taurine support heart, vision, and immune health Easy to Serve: Tear, squeeze, and feed as a treat, snack, or meal topper Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 7.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.20% Crude Fiber (max): 0.30% Moisture (max): 91.00% Vitamin E (min): 310 IU/kg Taurine (min): 0.025% Calorie Content: 430 kcal/kg | 6 kcal per tube (ME) Net Weight: 2.0 oz (0.5 oz × 4 tubes) Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Always provide clean, fresh water and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as poss
